# Pollinations.ai

> Open-source generative AI platform with free APIs for image, text, audio, and video generation. OpenAI-compatible endpoints at gen.pollinations.ai. No API key required for basic usage.

## Getting Started
- [API Documentation](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/blob/main/APIDOCS.md): Complete API reference with endpoints, parameters, and examples
- [Dashboard](https://enter.pollinations.ai): Get API keys for higher rate limits and premium models

## API Reference
- [Image Generation](https://gen.pollinations.ai/image/a%20beautiful%20sunset): GET `gen.pollinations.ai/image/{prompt}` — models: flux, gptimage, seedream5, nanobanana, kontext
- [Text Generation](https://gen.pollinations.ai/v1/chat/completions): POST OpenAI-compatible chat completions — models: openai, claude, gemini, deepseek, grok, mistral, and 20+ more
- [Simple Text](https://gen.pollinations.ai/text/hello): GET `gen.pollinations.ai/text/{prompt}` — quick text generation
- [Audio / TTS](https://gen.pollinations.ai/audio/hello): GET `gen.pollinations.ai/audio/{text}?voice=nova` — text-to-speech with 30+ voices
- [Video Generation](https://gen.pollinations.ai/v1/chat/completions): POST with video models (seedance, veo) — 1-10 second clips
- [Model Discovery](https://gen.pollinations.ai/v1/models): GET available models — always up to date

## SDKs & Tools
- [JavaScript SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@pollinations_ai/sdk): `npm install @pollinations_ai/sdk` — image, text, audio, video generation
- [React Hooks](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@pollinations/react): `npm install @pollinations/react` — usePollinationsImage, usePollinationsText, usePollinationsChat
- [Python SDK](https://pypi.org/project/pollinations/): `pip install pollinations` — community-maintained Python client
- [MCP Server](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@pollinations_ai/mcp): `npx @pollinations_ai/mcp` — Model Context Protocol server for AI coding tools

## Example Apps
- [Starter Template (React)](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/tree/main/apps/_templates/react): Minimal React + Vite app with Pollinations API
- [Starter Template (HTML)](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/tree/main/apps/_templates/html): Single-file HTML app with image generation
- [CatGPT](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/tree/main/apps/catgpt): Meme generator — vanilla JS
- [AI Dungeon Master](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/tree/main/apps/ai-dungeon-master): Text RPG — React + Vite
- [Chat](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/tree/main/apps/chat): Full chat interface — React + Vite
- [Community Apps](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/blob/main/apps/APPS.md): 800+ community-built apps

## Optional
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations): Source code, issues, and contributions
- [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/pollinations-ai-885844321461485618): 17,500+ members
